overall.description: A cinematic third-person walkthrough of a neon-lit cyberpunk city at night, featuring wet reflective streets, towering skyscrapers with holographic advertisements, and a character with a glowing yellow umbrella. The footage appears to be from Cyberpunk 2077, showcasing dense urban architecture with Japanese-inspired signage and atmospheric haze.

scene_state.functional_zone: neon-lit cyberpunk boulevard with wet reflective pavement

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the sidewalk, observing the neon-lit cityscape

entered.detail: tall building with cyan and pink neon strip lighting
rain-slicked multi-lane road reflecting neon lights
tall modern street light illuminating the misty air
orange and black striped barriers separating sidewalk from road
large vertical screen displaying purple and white graphics
small yellow and green food stand with illuminated menu

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a rain-slicked cyberpunk street at night, with neon lights reflecting off the wet asphalt. The camera moves forward along the sidewalk, passing orange traffic barriers and a small yellow food kiosk, while towering buildings with glowing facades line the right side of the street.

scene_state.functional_zone: crowded sidewalk with steam vents and neon storefronts

events.description: camera turns left to follow a character with a glowing yellow umbrella

agents.ego_description: following closely behind a character with a distinctive glowing yellow umbrella and illuminated hair

notable_agents.action: walking ahead with a glowing yellow circular umbrella and neon-green hair

entered.detail: large blue neon sign reading 'HOテル' on building facade
grate emitting white steam onto the sidewalk
smooth dark green building wall with metallic accents
black and yellow bollards lining the curb

segments.scene_description: The camera follows a character with a glowing yellow umbrella through a moderately crowded sidewalk. Steam rises from a street vent on the left while neon signs including a blue 'HOテル' sign illuminate the right. Black and yellow bollards line the curb as pedestrians walk in the same direction.

scene_state.functional_zone: large intersection with yellow zebra crossing and wet pavement

events.description: character steps onto the crosswalk and begins crossing the wide intersection
vehicles pass by on the wet road while the group crosses

agents.ego_description: crossing the wide intersection with a group of pedestrians, following the glowing umbrella character

notable_agents.action: leading the way across the crosswalk with the glowing umbrella

entered.detail: broad yellow and black striped pedestrian crossing
large building with prominent red 'kabayan foods' signage
red pedestrian signal box with yellow walk symbol

segments.scene_description: The group crosses a wide, wet intersection marked with bold yellow zebra stripes. The 'kabayan foods' building dominates the far side with bright red signage. Vehicles pass on the slick roads as the camera follows the glowing umbrella character across the open space, transitioning from the enclosed sidewalk to the expansive crossing.

scene_state.functional_zone: towering skyscraper canyon with overhead transit bridge

events.description: camera tilts upward to look at the tops of the skyscrapers and overhead structures

agents.ego_description: stopping to look up at the towering architecture and neon-lit skyscrapers above

entered.detail: massive towering buildings extending into the hazy night sky
elevated yellow and black transit track crossing above the street
building front with intense purple and pink neon lighting

segments.scene_description: After crossing, the camera pans upward to reveal the immense scale of the surrounding skyscrapers piercing the hazy night sky. An overhead transit bridge with yellow and black striping crosses above, while the 'kabayan foods' sign now appears to the left. The perspective emphasizes the vertical density of the cyberpunk cityscape with neon lights illuminating the towering structures.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a rain-slicked urban corridor that expands from a narrow sidewalk into a towering, vertical cityscape. It begins by gliding along a wet asphalt street past orange traffic barriers and a yellow food kiosk, with neon facades reflecting off the ground. As the camera follows a character with a glowing yellow umbrella, the scene shifts past rising steam vents and blue hotel signage toward a wide intersection marked by bold yellow zebra stripes. The perspective then opens up as the group crosses the expansive road toward the bright red signage of the Kabayan Foods building. Finally, the camera pans upward from the street level to reveal an overhead transit bridge and immense skyscrapers piercing a hazy, neon-lit night sky.
